tasks.subject: Follow up with FareHarbor
tasks.body: 75% of their customers are US, They offer automated reporting but its limited to a few things and customers dont know how to use most of their features - so there should be a software partner opportunity with them to re-sell. A big pain-point for them (fareharbor) is expanding/growth beyond us and therefore being compliance with onboarding in Asia and the Carribean (so the kyc/kyb but also the compliance requirements in those markets) is a pain point for them. they are using d-local in africa but not good. Next steps: send through a deck of what we do exactly that highlights 2 opportunities 1) Services to sell to their customers for the reporting and onboarding 2) Services that Fareharbor could use to enter new markets above

tasks.subject: Set meeting with NAHV
tasks.body:
NAHV are looking for another Annual Reporting solution fairly urgently

  • A lot of clients currently using Emilysystems.nl will churn this year and go somewhere else.

  • Right now NAHV are forced to use Audition - and they harte it due to the lack of integration capabilities

@Bas Bogerdto setup a time between @Johann Rozario and mja@nahv.nl ti discuss

tasks.body:
"@⁨Johann⁩ pls ping me on Thursday so I can find out where we are at with it."

"I know USA tax is the focus and we decided to do everything ourselves including tax cost base engine because of high costs. Except for submissions to IRS because of large fines if something goes wrong. I’d imagine our approach will be the same with dac8 - our team always wants to do everything in house but u never know. I think it’s a good time to ask."
